tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Scan a URL for agent capabilities and payment protocols. Returns full results including x402, MPP, L402, discovery, bazaar, MCP, plugins, OpenAPI, and more.

tools.name: scan_compact
tools.description: Compact scan returning only rails, capabilities, and a numeric score. Optimized for agent decision-making.

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Get scan history for a URL. Requires database to be configured.

tools.name: validate_x402_json
tools.description: Validate x402.json content against expected schema. Returns errors, warnings, and suggestions. No network requests — pure validation.
